ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_code" TEXT /* Code for the department (e.g., COGS) */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chair */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., building and room) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code for the course (e.g., COGS 201) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses (e.g., JSON array of course IDs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_code" TEXT /* Code for the section (e.g., A00, B01) */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., lecture, discussion, lab) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the section */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the section */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the section (e.g., building and room) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office (e.g., building and room) */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Schedule of the instructor's office hours (e.g., JSON array of day-time pairs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section being offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is being offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is being offered */,
  "classroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classroom where the course is offered */,
  "enrollment_open_date" TEXT /* Date when enrollment opens */,
  "enrollment_close_date" TEXT /* Date when enrollment closes */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current status of enrollment (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, waitlisted) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Grade Point Average of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the student is waitlisted for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student waitlisted for the course */,
  "waitlist_position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was added to the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the schedule belongs to */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is scheduled (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the course is scheduled (e.g., 9:00 AM, 10:00 AM) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course (e.g., in minutes) */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_capacities" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course capacity */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the capacity belongs to */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_capacities_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment limit */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the limit belongs to */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_limits_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the availability belongs to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor the availability belongs to */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the instructor is available to teach the course */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the availability period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the availability period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment history entry */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the history belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the history belongs to */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_history_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
